member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog
member.summary: Represents a dialog for adding hyperlinks in the RadMarkupEditor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.OnShown(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Called when the dialog is shown.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.URI
member.summary: Gets the URI entered by the user.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.LocalizeForm
member.summary: Localizes the form's text elements using the current localization provider.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.AddHyperlinkDialog_Load(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the Load event of the AddHyperlinkDialog.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.radComboBox1_SelectedValueChanged(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the SelectedValueChanged event of the protocol combo box.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.AddHyperlinkDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter
member.summary: A filter that converts deprecated HTML attributes to CSS properties for XHTML compliance.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content by converting deprecated attributes to CSS properties.
member.param: The HTML content element to process.
member.returns: The processed content with attributes converted to CSS.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.GetDesignContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes design content by converting CSS properties back to HTML attributes.
member.param: The design content element to process.
member.returns: The processed content with CSS converted to attributes.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.ConvertAttribute(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Converts an HTML attribute to its equivalent CSS property.
member.param: The CSS property name to set.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.ConvertCSSProperty(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts a CSS property back to its equivalent HTML attribute.
member.param: The CSS property name to convert.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.CleanAttributesFilter.ConvertTypeAttribute(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Converts type attribute to list-style-type CSS property for list elements.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands
member.summary: Contains constant values for HTML editor commands used in the RadMarkupEditor.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.FontName
member.summary: Command for setting font name.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.FontSize
member.summary: Command for setting font size.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.ForeColor
member.summary: Command for setting text foreground color.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.BackColor
member.summary: Command for setting text background color.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.OrderedList
member.summary: Command for creating ordered lists.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.UnorderedList
member.summary: Command for creating unordered lists.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Bold
member.summary: Command for applying bold formatting.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Italic
member.summary: Command for applying italic formatting.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Underline
member.summary: Command for applying underline formatting.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Left
member.summary: Command for left text alignment.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Center
member.summary: Command for center text alignment.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Right
member.summary: Command for right text alignment.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.None
member.summary: Command for removing text alignment.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Cut
member.summary: Command for cutting text to clipboard.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Copy
member.summary: Command for copying text to clipboard.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Paste
member.summary: Command for pasting text from clipboard.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Delete
member.summary: Command for deleting selected text.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Undo
member.summary: Command for undoing the last action.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Redo
member.summary: Command for redoing the last undone action.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Indent
member.summary: Command for increasing text indentation.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Outdent
member.summary: Command for decreasing text indentation.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Mode
member.summary: Command for switching editor mode.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.Hyperlink
member.summary: Command for creating hyperlinks.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Commands.InsertImage
member.summary: Command for inserting images.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ConvertFontToSpanFilter
member.summary: A filter that converts deprecated font tags to CSS-compliant span tags and vice versa.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ConvertFontToSpanFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ConvertFontToSpanFilter.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts FONT tags to SPAN tags with appropriate CSS styles for HTML output.
member.param: The HTML content containing font tags to convert.
member.returns: The processed content with FONT tags converted to SPAN tags.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ConvertFontToSpanFilter.GetDesignContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Converts SPAN tags back to FONT tags for design view compatibility.
member.param: The design content containing span tags to convert.
member.returns: The processed content with SPAN tags converted to FONT tags.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ConvertFontToSpanFilter.RemoveElementStyleAttribute(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a specific style attribute from an HTML element.
member.param: The name of the style attribute to remove.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorMode
member.summary: Specifies the display mode for the markup editor.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorMode.Design
member.summary: Visual design mode where users can edit content using a WYSIWYG interface.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorMode.Html
member.summary: HTML source mode where users can edit the raw HTML markup.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorToolbar
member.summary: The toolbar of the control

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter
member.summary: Represents a base filter for HTML markup processing in the RadMarkUpEditor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the filter is enabled.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.IsDom
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this filter operates on DOM elements.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the filter.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the filter.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content and returns the filtered result.
member.returns: The processed HTML content.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.GetDesignContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes design content and returns the filtered result.
member.returns: The processed design content.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter.GetElements(mshtml.IHTMLElement2,System.String)
member.summary: Gets elements by tag name from the specified content element.
member.param: The content element to search in.
The tag name to search for.
member.returns: A collection of HTML elements matching the tag name.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager
member.summary: Manages a collection of markup filters for HTML content processing in RadMarkUpEditor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.#ctor(mshtml.IHTMLDocument2)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The HTML document to associate with the filters.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.EnableXhtmlFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether XHTML filtering is enabled.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.Clear
member.summary: Clears all filters from the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.Add(Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter)
member.summary: Adds a filter to the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.AddAt(Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter,System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts a filter at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index at which to insert the filter.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.Remove(Telerik.WinControls.UI.Filter)
member.summary: Removes a filter from the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes the filter at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the filter to remove.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.GetFilterAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the filter at the specified index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the filter to get.
member.returns: The filter at the specified index.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.GetFilterByName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a filter by its name.
member.param: The name of the filter to find.
member.returns: The filter with the specified name, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.GetDesignContent(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the design content as a string by applying the relevant filters.
member.returns: The processed design content.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.GetDesignContentDom(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the design content as an HTML element by applying the relevant DOM filters.
member.returns: The processed HTML element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FiltersManager.GetHtmlContent(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the HTML content as a string by applying the relevant filters to the DOM element.
member.returns: The processed HTML content as a string.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils
member.summary: Provides utility methods for HTML element manipulation and filtering operations in RadMarkUpEditor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.isNaN(System.Object)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified value is not a number.
member.returns: True if the value is not a number; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.Children(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the children collection of the specified HTML element.
member.param: The HTML element whose children to retrieve.
member.returns: A collection of child elements, or null if the element is null.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.ChildrenLength(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the length of the children collection for the specified HTML element.
member.param: The HTML element whose children count to retrieve.
member.returns: The number of child elements, or 0 if the element is null or has no children.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.FirstChild(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the first child element of the specified HTML element.
member.param: The HTML element whose first child to retrieve.
member.returns: The first child element, or null if the element is null or has no children.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.SetElementInnerHtml(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the inner HTML of an element, handling browser-specific issues.
member.param: The HTML element to set the inner HTML for.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.RemoveNode(mshtml.IHTMLDOMNode)
member.summary: Removes a node from the DOM while moving all its children to the parent node.
member.returns: The parent node, or null if the operation failed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.GetOuterHtml(mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Gets the outer HTML of the specified HTML element.
member.param: The HTML element whose outer HTML to retrieve.
member.returns: The outer HTML of the element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.SelectElement(mshtml.IHTMLDocument2,mshtml.IHTMLElement)
member.summary: Selects the specified HTML element in the document.
member.param: The HTML document containing the element.
member.returns: True if the element was successfully selected; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.GetCurrentStyle(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Gets the current style value for the specified attribute of an HTML element.
member.param: The HTML element to get the style from.
The style attribute name to retrieve.
The default value to return if the attribute is not found.
member.returns: The style value, or the default value if not found.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.GetSelectedElement(mshtml.IHTMLDocument2)
member.summary: Gets the currently selected HTML element in the document.
member.param: The HTML document to get the selection from.
member.returns: The selected HTML element, or null if no element is selected or an error occurs.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FilterUtils.MergeElementAttributes(mshtml.IHTMLElement,mshtml.IHTMLElement2)
member.summary: Merges attributes from one HTML element to another.
member.param: The source HTML element to copy attributes from.
The target HTML element to copy attributes to.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixEnclosingP
member.summary: A filter that removes unnecessary enclosing paragraph tags from HTML content.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixEnclosingP.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixEnclosingP.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content to remove unnecessary enclosing paragraph tags.
member.param: The HTML content element to process.
member.returns: The processed content with unnecessary paragraph tags removed.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixNestedLists
member.summary: A filter that fixes nested list structures to produce valid XHTML markup.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixNestedLists.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixNestedLists.FixLists(mshtml.IHTMLElement,System.String)
member.summary: Fixes nested list structures by moving nested lists into proper list item containers.
member.param: The content element containing the lists.
The tag name of the list type to fix (OL or UL).

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixNestedLists.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content to fix nested list structures.
member.returns: The processed HTML content with fixed nested lists.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixUlBoldItalic
member.summary: A filter that fixes underline, bold, and italic formatting by converting tags to spans with CSS.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixUlBoldItalic.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixUlBoldItalic.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content and returns the filtered result.
member.param: The HTML content element to process.
member.returns: The processed HTML content element.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.FixUlBoldItalic.GetDesignContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes design content and returns the filtered result.
member.param: The design content element to process.
member.returns: The processed design content element.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand
member.summary: Represents a base command for HTML editing operations in the markup editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Appropriate
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command is appropriate for the current context.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the command is enabled.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Document
member.summary: Gets the HTML document associated with this command.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Command
member.summary: Gets the command string.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Editor
member.summary: Gets the markup editor instance.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.#ctor(System.String,Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Execute
member.summary: Executes the command without parameters.
member.returns: True if the command was executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: Executes the command with the specified value.
member.returns: True if the command was executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IndentCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for indenting/outdenting text in lists.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ClipboardCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for clipboard operations (cut, copy, paste).

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ClipboardCommand.#ctor(System.String,Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ClipboardCommand.Appropriate
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command is appropriate for the current context. Clipboard commands are always appropriate.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommandWithValue
member.summary: Represents an HTML command that can work with values.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommandWithValue.#ctor(System.String,Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommandWithValue.HasValue
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command has a determinate value.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlCommandWithValue.Value
member.summary: Gets the current value of the command.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RealFontSizeCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for setting real font sizes with various units.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RealFontSizeCommand.MarkedSelection
member.summary: Represents the result of marking a selection for font formatting operations.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RealFontSizeCommand.MarkedSelection.MarkedElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of marked HTML elements.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RealFontSizeCommand.MarkedSelection.NewElements
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of newly created HTML elements.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ColorCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for setting and getting color values.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ColorCommand.#ctor(System.String,Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ColorCommand.Value
member.summary: Gets the current color value of the command.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ColorCommand.ConvertToColor(System.String)
member.summary: Convert the custom integer (B G R) format to a color object.
member.param: the custom color as a string
member.returns: the color

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ColorCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: Executes the color command with the specified color value.
member.returns: True if the command was executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditStackCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for undo/redo operations with edit stack functionality.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditStackCommand.Text
member.summary: Gets the descriptive text for the command.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.NewLineCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for inserting line breaks.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HyperlinkCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for creating and managing hyperlinks.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HyperlinkCommand.Appropriate
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the command is appropriate for the current context.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HyperlinkCommand.Value
member.summary: Gets the current hyperlink value.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HyperlinkCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: Executes the hyperlink command with the specified URL.
member.param: The URL value for the hyperlink.
member.returns: True if the command was executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ImageCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for inserting images.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ImageCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: Executes the image command with the specified image source.
member.returns: True if the command was executed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ModeCommand
member.summary: Represents a command for switching between editor modes.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IHtmlBox.Value
member.summary: Get/Set the contents of the document Body, in html.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor
member.summary: Defines the contract for RadMarkupEditor implementations.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor.InvokeUpdateUI
member.summary: Invokes the UI update operation to refresh the editor's state.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTML markup value of the editor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor.ChangeModeInternal(Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorMode)
member.summary: Changes the editor mode internally between Design and HTML view.
member.param: The editor mode to switch to.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor.InsertHtml(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts HTML content at the current cursor position.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IRadMarkupEditor.DesignViewDomDocument
member.summary: Gets the DOM document associated with the design view.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor
member.summary: A rich text markup editor control that provides a ribbon-based user interface for text formatting and HTML editing.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.LocalizeForm
member.summary: Applies the current localization settings to all UI elements in the editor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.InvokeUpdateUI
member.summary: Refreshes the user interface elements based on the current state of the editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTML content being edited in the markup editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.RawValue
member.summary: Gets the complete HTML content including root HTML tags, with all symbols properly escaped.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.ChangeModeInternal(Telerik.WinControls.UI.EditorMode)
member.summary: Changes the internal editing mode of the editor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.InsertHtml(System.String)
member.summary: Inserts HTML content at the current cursor position.
member.exception: This method is not currently implemented.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.DesignViewDomDocument
member.summary: Gets the underlying HTML document object model of the design view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.DefaultFont
member.summary: Gets or sets the default font used for text in the markup editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.RibbonBar
member.summary: Gets the ribbon bar control used in the editor's interface.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.IsValueSaved
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current content has been saved.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.CopyButton
member.summary: Gets the copy button element in the design view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.CopyButton2
member.summary: Gets the copy button element in the markup view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.PasteButton
member.summary: Gets the paste button element in the design view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.PasteButton2
member.summary: Gets the paste button element in the markup view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.CutButton
member.summary: Gets the cut button element in the design view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.CutButton2
member.summary: Gets the cut button element in the markup view.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.BoldButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for applying bold formatting.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.ItalicButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for applying italic formatting.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.UnderlineButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for applying underline formatting.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.ForeColorButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for changing text color.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.BackColorButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for changing text background color.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.UnorderedListButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for creating or formatting an unordered (bulleted) list.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.OrderedListButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for creating or formatting an ordered (numbered) list.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.HyperlinkButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for inserting or editing a hyperlink.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.ApplyButton
member.summary: Gets the main apply button element that commits changes and closes the editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.SmallApplyButton
member.summary: Gets the small apply button element in the quick access toolbar.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.UndoButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for undoing the last operation.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.RedoButton
member.summary: Gets the button element for redoing the last undone operation.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.FontFamilyDropDownList
member.summary: Gets the dropdown list element for selecting font families.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.FontSizeDropDownList
member.summary: Gets the dropdown list element for selecting font sizes.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.EditorClosed
member.summary: Occurs when the editor is closed after applying changes.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.OnBodyInteraction(System.Object,System.Windows.Forms.HtmlElementEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles HTML element events from the document body and updates the UI accordingly.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.OnBodyInteraction
member.summary: Updates the UI controls to reflect the current state of the selection in the editor.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditor.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditorLocalizationProvider
member.summary: Provides localized strings for RadMarkupEditor control.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupEditorLocalizationProvider.GetLocalizedString(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the localized string for the specified identifier.
member.returns: The localized string, or an empty string if the identifier is not found.

member.summary: Contains string identifiers for localizable strings in RadMarkupEditor.

member.summary: Get/Set the contents of the document Body, in html.

member.summary: Contains event keys used for managing editor events.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkUpEditorWithToolbarInterface.EventKeys.UpdateUI
member.summary: Event key for UI update events.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkUpEditorWithToolbarInterface.EventKeys.HtmlModeValueChange
member.summary: Event key for HTML mode value change events.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView
member.summary: Defines the contract for editor view implementations.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the HTML value of the editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.Text
member.summary: Gets the plain text content of the editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.SelectedText
member.summary: Gets the currently selected text.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.SelectionStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the start position of the text selection.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.SelectionLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the text selection.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.SelectAll
member.summary: Selects all text in the editor.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.IEditorView.InsertText(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts text at the current position with the specified selection offset.
member.param: The offset for the selection position after insertion.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.HtmlView
member.summary: Represents the HTML source view of the markup editor.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.DesignView
member.summary: Represents the visual design view of the markup editor using a WebBrowser control.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.DesignView.RawValue
member.summary: HtmlValue without to apply the Filters (XHTML, etc.)

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.DesignView.SelectAll
member.summary: Selects the whole text.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RemoveExtraBrakes
member.summary: A filter that removes extra line breaks from HTML content within certain tags.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RemoveExtraBrakes.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RemoveExtraBrakes.GetHtmlContent(System.Object)
member.summary: Processes HTML content to remove extra line break tags within certain elements.
member.param: The HTML content string to process.
member.returns: The processed content with extra line breaks removed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RemoveExtraBrakes.PerformStripping(System.String)
member.summary: Performs the actual stripping of extra line break tags from the HTML content.
member.param: The initial HTML content to process.
member.returns: The processed HTML content with extra line breaks removed.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ToggleToolStripButton
member.summary: Represents a toggle-style ToolStripButton that can display different text and tooltips based on its checked state. Tooltip text can be one string or two strings separated by '|' for different states.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ToggleToolStripButton.SplitText(System.String)
member.summary: Splits the input string by the separator character into an array.
member.returns: An array of strings.
member.exception: Thrown when the string doesn't contain exactly two parts separated by the separator.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ToggleToolStripButton.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The text for the button in format "unchecked|checked".

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.ToggleToolStripButton.OnCheckedChanged(System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Called when the checked state of the button changes.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.XhtmlFilter
member.summary: A filter that converts HTML content to XHTML-compliant format.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.XhtmlFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.Properties.MarkupDialogResources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog
member.summary: A dialog that allows users to edit and apply markup formatting to text.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the resources used by the .
member.param: A value indicating whether the method was invoked by a call.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the markup text being edited. Set this property before showing the dialog to provide initial content, and retrieve it after the dialog closes to get the user's changes. Use the DialogResult to determine if the user applied changes or canceled.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Editor
member.summary: Gets the instance used within the dialog.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Form
member.summary: Gets the instance used to host the markup editor.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.ThemeName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the theme applied to the dialog.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.DefaultFont
member.summary: Gets or sets the default font used when the editor is started. No formatting tags are added for this font as it is considered the default. Users can still explicitly set font name and size using the editor controls.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets the dialog by clearing the markup text value.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.Editor_EditorClosed(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handles the editor closed event by setting the dialog result and closing the form.
member.param: The instance containing the event data.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadMarkupDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Displays the modal dialog box.
member.param: The window handle of the owner window for the dialog.
member.returns: true if the user clicked OK or Apply in the dialog; otherwise, false.
